summary: Kimi Antonelli storms to pole position at Spa, signaling Mercedes' resurging pace and immediately challenging Max Verstappen's Belgian dominance with teammate Russell left adrift in fourth. Lando Norris fights through a brutal 10-place grid penalty while Lewis Hamilton attempts to build momentum at Ferrari following his Spain breakthrough, as Pierre Gasly's heavy crash Friday hints at treacherous conditions ahead. A strong result here could crystallize either Mercedes' championship resurgence or prove Hamilton's Spanish victory a genuine turning point for the Scuderia's title bid.
